arts.sum: Jude Bellingham made his public debut with social media star Ashlyn Castro after the star midfielder all but ending Manchester City's European hopes

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for LaLiga match against Osasuna
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s away match against Osasuna in La Liga. HOW TO WATCH, STREAM LA LIGA

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "We need a repeat of all the good things we did against Manchester City"
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the press at Real Madrid City on the eve of the LaLiga matchday 24 clash with Osasuna at El Sadar (Saturday, 4:15 pm CET): “We're in good shape and highly motivated. They're going to keep working individually until Monday, then starting Tuesday they'll be back with the team and available for the game City, and the same goes for Lucas Vázquez.

arts.ttl: Rodri banner gave Vinicius Jr 'more strength' v Man City
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Vinicius Jr says the display of a banner highlighting Rodri's Ballon d'Or win before kick-off at Manchester City motivated him even more to win the Champions League play-off first leg.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Osasuna - La Liga
arts.sum: Predicting Real Madrid's starting lineup for their La Liga clash with Osasuna on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid star will continue out of position vs Osasuna
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has confirmed that Federico Valverde will continue to line out in defence in the club’s next outing. Real, of course, are primed to return…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti serene amid Vini to Saudi league link
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti is not paying much attention to the ongoing speculation that Vinícius Júnior could leave the club this summer and play in Saudi Arabia.

arts.ttl: Spending spree: Real Madrid ready to sell Vini Jr to fund transfers for Arsenal star & Man Utd target
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly considering three big-name transfer targets they could spend the money from Vinicius Junior’s sale on.
